channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Dark Side of Tech: Women in IT Struggle with Gender Bias and Discrimination
item.description: Women in the tech industry face significant challenges, including gender bias and discrimination, which hinder their career advancement. A recent survey by Acronis reveals the grim reality of the situation, highlighting the need for change.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
